description: Canonical index for this Storybook pattern. Use Docs.mdx for copy-paste imports and vendor checklist; Two Pane Implemented (MinimalTwoPane export) is the shortest Canvas template (two panes, code rail + block in primary pane).

styles.note: Four direct SCSS sources imported with ?inline in registerSplitView.ts.

widgetStatusEnum: src/components/reusable/widget/defs.ts (WIDGET_STATUS). Issue-list demo uses `kyn-widget` for accent treatment and maps those statuses to preserve the original Figma severity colors.
integrationOrder: Import registerSplitView.ts so the helper elements are registered and splitViewStoryStyles is available.
Import design-system components used by the story.

Use <split-view-pattern> with named slots pane-1, pane-2, and optionally pane-3; optional default-start-pane-width / default-end-pane-width (px) for initial pane-1 / pane-3 widths; set invert-start-divider-grip when pane-2 is dark on a light start pane (two-pane code); set invert-end-divider-grip when pane-3 is dark (three-pane code rail).
Optional end-pane code: wrap kyn-block-code-view in split-view-code-rail for flush rail behavior.
